pi_items.source: setup_openproject.sh creates 'Mobile Banking App' with identifier 'mobile-banking-app', and setup_task.sh queries this identifier.

The task description instructs configuring the dashboard to include 'Members' and 'News' widgets. export_result.sh lists 'members' and 'news' as example widget identifiers, and the verifier checks for these explicitly.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data in a local OpenProject instance. The target project identifier is 'mobile-banking-app', as defined in the setup scripts. The agent must customize the project's Overview page to include the 'members' and 'news' widgets. These widget requirements are confirmed by the task description and verifier logic.
